steps.t: Silkencaps, a pale mushroom native to the Blackroot Vale, can be found in the caverns of Lhingroth in the hills to the south-east of Sardol. Sidharan …
Sidharan can be found in Sardol. You have collected many silkencaps from the caverns of Lhingroth. You should deliver them to Sidharan in Sardol.
